title: Brussels moves to dismantle carbon price support mechanism
summary_full: The EU Emissions Trading System has been blamed for pushing up electricity prices and making manufacturers pay the world's highest price for their CO2 pollution
summary_public: The EU Emissions Trading System has been blamed for pushing up electricity prices and making manufacturers pay the world's highest price for their CO2 pollution
